Drivers and functions for display, flash, I2C, button, debug serial, GPIO, PMIC, power, and watchdog.

## Folders
- **[display](display/README.md)**: Drivers and functions for FPGA-based and ICE40LP display initialization, configuration, and control.
- **[flash](flash/README.md)**: CRC32 checksum calculation and MT25Q flash memory driver with QSPI operations.
- **[i2c](i2c/README.md)**: I2C driver and hardware abstraction layer for STM32F7, with data structures, functions, and error handling.

## Files
- **[button.c](button.c.md)**: Button driver implementation for initializing and reading button states on the Pebble platform.
- **[button.h](button.h.md)**: Functions for initializing buttons, checking if a button is pressed, and getting button state bits.
- **[button_id.h](button_id.h.md)**: Defines button ID values for handling button input in the user interface.
- **[dbgserial.c](dbgserial.c.md)**: Implements a debug serial communication driver for UART3 with message framing and CRC validation.
- **[dbgserial.h](dbgserial.h.md)**: Serial debugging functions for initialization, string output, and formatted printing.
- **[display.h](display/README.md.h)**: Functions for initializing the display, showing boot splash, error codes, and firmware update progress.
- **[exti.h](exti.h.md)**: Header file for configuring and managing external interrupts on STM32F2 microcontrollers.
- **[exti.inl.h](exti.inl.h.md)**: Inline helper functions to enable and disable external interrupt lines.
- **[flash.h](flash/README.md.h)**: Functions for initializing, reading, checking, and calculating checksums on a flash memory chip.
- **[gpio.c](gpio.c.md)**: Functions for initializing, configuring, and managing GPIO pins in various modes and states.
- **[gpio.h](gpio.h.md)**: Functions for initializing, configuring, and managing GPIO pins, including power optimization and input/output settings.
- **[i2c.h](i2c/README.md.h)**: I2C bus management functions for reading and writing registers and blocks with slave devices.
- **[max14690_pmic.c](max14690_pmic.c.md)**: Driver implementation for the MAX14690 PMIC, managing power rails, battery measurement, and charger state.
- **[periph_config.c](periph_config.c.md)**: Configures peripheral clocks for STM32F7 microcontrollers with optional debug logging.
- **[periph_config.h](periph_config.h.md)**: Functions for initializing, locking, enabling, and disabling peripheral configurations.
- **[pmic.h](pmic.h.md)**: Functions for initializing and controlling the PMIC, including power management and battery monitoring.
- **[pwr.c](pwr.c.md)**: Power management functions for accessing the backup domain and checking standby boot status.
- **[pwr.h](pwr.h.md)**: Functions for managing power-related operations, including backup domain access and standby boot status.
- **[system_flash.c](system_flash.c.md)**: Functions for erasing and writing to system flash memory on STM32F7 microcontrollers.
- **[system_flash.h](system_flash.h.md)**: Defines flash memory sector addresses and functions for erasing and writing to flash memory.
- **[watchdog.c](watchdog.c.md)**: Initializes, starts, and checks the reset flag of the watchdog timer on an STM32F7 microcontroller.
- **[watchdog.h](watchdog.h.md)**: Functions for initializing, starting, and checking the reset flag of a watchdog timer.
